commit.subject: LU-19179 compat: remove RHEL7 dcache handling
commit.message:
LU-19179 compat: remove RHEL7 dcache handling

Now that RHEL7 is no longer supported we can greatly
simplify the dcache handling for Lustre.

Test-Parameter: trivial
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
